arts.ttl: Mathys Tel update: Bayern Munich forward speaks out on transfer, with Manchester United, Chelsea, Tottenham Hotspur linked
arts.sum: Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel speaks out on his future amidst speculation he could leave to join Premier League sides Manchester United, Chelsea or Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: £40m striker waves goodbye to fans after Champions League match following links with Tottenham and Arsenal
arts.sum: In the space of around 24 hours, Mathys Tel is suddenly a name that both Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur fans can’t stop discussing around north...

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs 'make contact' over move for Brentford forward
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly make contact over a potential move to sign Brentford forward Yoane Wissa before the end of the transfer window.
Match of the Day 2 pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger and Shay Given debate whether Tottenham should back manager Ange Postecoglou after their 2-1 Premier League home defeat to Leicester.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham Hotspurs look to Premier League striker with 14 G/A as ‘concrete option’
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have reportedly initiated talks with Brentford to secure the signing of Yoane Wissa. A key player for the Bees this season, the 28-year-old has provided 14 goal contributions for the West London club. arts.ttl: Neto endures NIGHTMARE Arsenal debut as he makes huge error to gift Girona the opening goal... and it's a former Tottenham player who scores!
arts.sum: Neto, making his first appearance for the Gunners at the age of 35 years and 194 days, was in in place of regular No 1 David Raya but the night was marked by a huge mistake from him.

arts.ttl: Team News: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Elfsborg injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs join 'three Premier League rivals' in race to sign Bayern Munich's Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly join three Premier League rivals in the race to sign Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.sum: Tottenham are reportedly preparing to offer Manchester United star Marcus Rashford a way out of Old Trafford before the transfer window closes. The North London club are actively searching for attacking reinforcements due to an ongoing injury crisis, with several key forwards currently sidelined.
